content: TASK-033 interrupt done: 2D area overlays keep the stable back-to-front order layer, zone, boundary, subgraph, and now add SVG-only visual outsets so deeper areas stay visible as padding: zone is expanded more than boundary, while subgraph remains the front grouping surface. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
